query:
INSERT INTO store_devices (
                id, store_id, device_id, device_name, app_version,
                status, registered_at, updated_at
            )
            VALUES (uuid_generate_v4(), $1, $2, $3, $4, 'online', NOW(), NOW())
            ON CONFLICT (device_id) 
            DO UPDATE SET 
                status = 'online',
                last_seen = NOW(),
                app_version = $4,
                updated_at = NOW()
